scripts.build: pnpm --filter @orbita/platform build && pnpm --filter @orbita/profiles build && pnpm --filter @orbita/auth build && pnpm --filter @orbita/tools build && pnpm --filter @orbita/trajectory build && pnpm --filter @orbita/admin build && pnpm --filter @orbita/sessions build && pnpm --filter @orbita/agent build && pnpm --filter @orbita/memory build && pnpm --filter @orbita/credentials build && pnpm --filter @orbita/waitlist build && pnpm --filter @orbita/scheduler build && pnpm --filter @orbita/api build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @orbita/platform build && pnpm --filter @orbita/profiles build && pnpm --filter @orbita/auth build && pnpm --filter @orbita/tools build && pnpm --filter @orbita/trajectory build && pnpm --filter @orbita/admin build && pnpm --filter @orbita/sessions build && pnpm --filter @orbita/agent build && pnpm --filter @orbita/memory build && pnpm --filter @orbita/credentials build && pnpm --filter @orbita/waitlist build && pnpm --filter @orbita/scheduler build && pnpm -r typecheck
